name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-3
title: Cross-file rule numbering: make each policy file independently numbered
description: spec-rules.md numbers rules 1-3 and coding-rules.md continues at 4-8, creating a cross-file dependency. Each file should be independently readable. Options: reset to 1 per file, or add file-scoped prefixes (S1-S3, C4-C8). Style change only — no semantic impact. Low priority: current numbering works fine when files are concatenated into CLAUDE.md.
